title: lithocardium glabratum
intro: Lithocardium glabratum, also known as Strophanthus gratus, is a flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a cardiac stimulant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lithocardium glabratum include the treatment of cardiac conditions such as heart failure and arrhythmias, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Lithocardium glabratum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dry extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
